description: Taking traditional designs and giving it modern twist is what makes ice watches irreplacable timepieces. The XXL Carbon wrist watch is no exception. Contemporary and trendy, it& rsquo s an affordable timepiece, with an exquisite design that highlights your individuality. Case diameter: 48 mm Case thickness: 15 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 2 years Transparent plastic case with fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Ice logo on the 12 hour mark Date aperture at the 3 hour mark White silicone strap with a tang clasp for comfort Press to reset time and alarm Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 100 meters, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfing.
